item.title: Make Ahead Breakfast Burritos
item.description: Simply make them, put them in the freezer and take them out when you need them. Easy and delicious

item.title: Crispy Hot Honey Buffalo Chicken Tenders
item.description: Hot Honey Buffalo Chicken Tenders are oven-baked, crispy, and coated in a sweet-spicy glaze that hits every note. They’re simple to prep, no frying required, and such a crowd-pleaser.

media:content.media:title: Crispy Hot Honey Buffalo Chicken Tenders
media:content.media:description: Hot Honey Buffalo Chicken Tenders are oven-baked, crispy, and coated in a sweet-spicy glaze that hits every note. They’re simple to prep, no frying required, and such a crowd-pleaser.

item.title: Mini Chocolate Sheet Cake
item.description: This Mini Chocolate Sheet Cake is inspired by your favorite devil’s food cake. The crumb is light, rich and super flavorful. The frosting is fudge-y and delicious, incorporating melted chocolate and heavy cream.

media:content.media:title: Mini Chocolate Sheet Cake
media:content.media:description: This Mini Chocolate Sheet Cake is inspired by your favorite devil’s food cake. The crumb is light, rich and super flavorful. The frosting is fudge-y and delicious, incorporating melted chocolate and heavy cream.

item.title: Lemon Pepper Carbonara: A Perfect Weeknight Meal
item.description: This lemon pepper carbonara is the perfect synergy of lemon zest and spicy black pepper. It works beautifully with creamy egg yolks and salty bits of bacon. This makes for the perfect weeknight meal.

media:content.media:title: Lemon Pepper Carbonara: A Perfect Weeknight Meal
media:content.media:description: This lemon pepper carbonara is the perfect synergy of lemon zest and spicy black pepper. It works beautifully with creamy egg yolks and salty bits of bacon. This makes for the perfect weeknight meal.

item.title: The Best Breakfast Sandwiches to Freeze
item.description: Warm one up and suddenly busy mornings feel a lot more special.

media:content.media:title: The Best Breakfast Sandwiches to Freeze
media:content.media:description: Warm one up and suddenly busy mornings feel a lot more special.

item.description: Welcome to my favorite weeknight meal: crispy spicy salmon tacos made easy

item.title: Your New Go-To Taco Recipe
item.description: These Ground Beef Tacos are easy and delicious. Filled flavorful ground beef that’s been sautéed with a homemade taco seasoning and stuffed in homemade crunchy taco shells

media:content.media:title: Your New Go-To Taco Recipe
media:content.media:description: These Ground Beef Tacos are easy and delicious. Filled flavorful ground beef that’s been sautéed with a homemade taco seasoning and stuffed in homemade crunchy taco shells

item.title: Easy Homemade Flan Recipe
item.description: This classic Flan recipe is a silky smooth, classic version of this traditional Latin American dessert. This caramel-topped custard is gently cooked in the oven until it’s firm to the touch.

media:content.media:title: Easy Homemade Flan Recipe
media:content.media:description: This classic Flan recipe is a silky smooth, classic version of this traditional Latin American dessert. This caramel-topped custard is gently cooked in the oven until it’s firm to the touch.

item.title: Delicious Tropical Banana Bread
item.description: This Tropical Banana Bread is the softest, most buttery, moist banana bread you’ll ever have. It’s got pineapple, coconut, and toasted macadamia nuts for a sunny twist on a classic loaf. Some riffs on banana bread that I also love are my tahini banana bread and butter pecan banana bread, which you should definitely give a try.

media:content.media:title: Delicious Tropical Banana Bread
media:content.media:description: This Tropical Banana Bread is the softest, most buttery, moist banana bread you’ll ever have. It’s got pineapple, coconut, and toasted macadamia nuts for a sunny twist on a classic loaf. Some riffs on banana bread that I also love are my tahini banana bread and butter pecan banana bread, which you should definitely give a try.

item.title: Pumpkin Sheet Cake with Brown Butter Frosting
item.description: This Mini Pumpkin Sheet Cake with Brown Butter Frosting is the perfect cake for fall. This pumpkin cake is fluffy, perfectly spiced and smothered with a brown butter frosting. It’s delicious and quick to throw together and ideal for a small get together.

media:content.media:title: Pumpkin Sheet Cake with Brown Butter Frosting
media:content.media:description: This Mini Pumpkin Sheet Cake with Brown Butter Frosting is the perfect cake for fall. This pumpkin cake is fluffy, perfectly spiced and smothered with a brown butter frosting. It’s delicious and quick to throw together and ideal for a small get together.
